name: Google Chat History
description: Read history, members, and metadata from allowlisted Google Chat spaces via the Chat API.

authMode.description: How to read messages. 'app' = service account (needs admin-approved scope). 'user' = OAuth as a human (no admin approval; token sees all your spaces, so allowedSpaces is enforced). Default 'app'.

serviceAccountFile.description: Path to the Google service account JSON key. Used by app-mode reads and by googlechat_members / googlechat_space_info (chat.bot). Falls back to env GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE or inline GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT.

user.description: OAuth user-auth credentials for message reads (authMode 'user'). Each falls back to env GOOGLE_CHAT_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID / _SECRET / _REFRESH_TOKEN. Prefer secrets/env over inline config.

allowedSpaces.description: Allowlist of readable space ids (e.g. 'spaces/AAQAxxxx'). DENY-BY-DEFAULT: if empty/unset, every tool refuses and auto-context never fires. This bounds what the agent can read; it does not reduce the token's own scope.

autoContext.description: Auto-inject recent space history before replies. Only fires for allowlisted spaces. Requires the host to allow prompt injection + conversation access for this plugin (see README).

messageCount.description: How many recent messages to inject (default 15, max 50).
